The '''''Ironhand''''' was [[High Inquisitor]] [[Mox Slosin]]'s personal ship. A modified [[Merkuni Drives]] [[Trenchant-class cruiser|''Trenchant''-class cruiser]], it was used by Slosin personally to patrol the [[Lesser Plooriod Cluster/Legends|Lesser Plooriod Cluster]] looking for Rebel activity. The ship frequently traveled through the [[Entana Run]] and the [[Burna Trade Route]].

{{Ship-stub}}
